title: Set of 3 Vintage Long Oval Galvanized Metal Garden Trough Planters Windowsill Box Herb Pots Outdoor Plant Pots
features: Please Note: read the description regarding product dimension clearly before ordering.

These trough shaped planters, liken chicken feeders, are ideal homes for succulents, herbs, vegetables, and flowers. Their lengthy shape makes them the perfect centerpiece when filled with forced bulbs or petite plants.
These galvanized zinc plant pots have authentic quality details that include gold rolled rim surround, vertical corrugated ribs and top handles at either side.
Strong & sturdy zinc construction, weather resistant and rust resistant. Come without drainage holes however these can be drilled through if required
Beautifully proportioned, display them next to each other to create a leveled container garden or individually to suit your spaces.
description: Product Description Galvanized Metal Trough Planters Long Oval Metal Plant Pots Create stunning centerpieces with this 3 piece set of trough planters. Ideal for placement on rectangular dining tables, let them hold favorite succulents or curate your own collection of potted plants and herbs. Perfect for both urban gardeners and home jungle enthusiasts, these rectangular trough planters are perfect to bring a tough of natural beauty indoors. Bringing together modern design with classic farmhouse materials, showcase your greenery on window sills, counter-tops or outside on decks and patios. Handcrafted of galvanized zinc, weather resistant and rust resistant, suitable for indoor & outdoor. Well made Window Box Pots Delicate Details These galvanized zinc plant pots have authentic quality details that include gold rolled rim surround, vertical corrugated ribs. Handy Handles The metal handles make for easy moving, the gold handles of the planter adds a luxe texture to your room. Sturdy zinc construction Strong & sturdy zinc construction, weather resistant and rust resistant, suitable for indoor & outdoor. Vintage Windowsill Herb Pots Metal Plant Pots for Herbs Boasting a galvanised finish for a deliberately distressed look that blends industrial with country style, each free standing plant pots will complement any outdoor space with ease. Two sturdy handles make the planters easy to transport around your garden, wherever you'd like them to be placed. This 3 pot planter set is perfect for growing kitchen herbs or other small house plants. Herb Pots for Windowsill Metal Windowsill Plant Pots A classic style set of 3 metal plant pots with a drainage hole and a metal tray with handles. Perfect for growing kitchen herbs or other small house plants. The herb plant pot set will look great on any worktop, window sill or table.
